title: <task> Working directory: /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto Add a pre-approval thumbnail guard to x-auto. Steps: 1. Read scripts/apply_post_package.py lines 108-130 to understand existing _queue_audit_blockers logic 2. Read scheduler.py _validate_pre_post function to understand thumbnail checks 3. Create a...
summary_text: Added the pre-approval thumbnail guard in [approval_guard.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py) and the 6 requested cases in [tests/test_approval_guard.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py). The guard is pure, imports `PostRecord` from [schema.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/schema.py), exempts `note.com/` and `x.com/`/`twitter.com/` posts, and otherwise blocks approval unless `image_path`, `thumbnail_image_present`, `thumbnail_qa_verified`, and `thumbnail_bytes >= 95000` are all satisfied. Verification passed with `./venv/bin/python -m pytest` because plain `python`/`python3` in this shell did not have `pytest` installed. Targeted run: `6 passed`. Full suite tail: `204 passed in 2.74s`. Committed as `d6fcc50` with message `feat: add approval_guard.py to block thumbnail-less posts from being approved`. `origin/main` is at the same commit, so the push is in place.
